subcodes.first_line: O Sign of Bounty, Sovereign of existence! Such favours as are justly due, wherein each rightful one receiveth his portion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آیت جود سلطان وجود الطافی که باستحقاق باشد که اعطاء کل ذی حق حقه است در
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @justice and mercy
